Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes has an honorable reputation.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes is also known as the Oracle Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes has the ability to see anywhere the Sage of a Thousand Eyes can.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes had commented on Eithan reaching Archlord.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes guides Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes uses floating eyes to provide illustrations for commands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes has a weakness in straightforward combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes can forge globes of light into eyes to amplify her authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Sage of a Thousand Eyes can grant vision.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
